forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Rivers State Control Room
forces.notes: Permanently assigned office lines — do not change with officer postings. High-risk/active zone

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Rivers State PRO

forces.name: 6th Division Nigerian Army — Port Harcourt
forces.source: army.mil.ng — division exists but direct contact not publicly listed
forces.notes: The 6th Amphibious Division covers Rivers, Bayelsa, Delta, Akwa Ibom. Contact via army.mil.ng or use 112 in emergencies.

forces.name: 6th Amphibious Division Nigerian Army — Port Harcourt
forces.notes: 6 Division covers the South-South/Niger Delta. HQ Port Harcourt. No public phone — contact via @HQNigerianArmy.

forces.name: NSCDC — National (works in Rivers)
forces.source: nscdc.gov.ng official website — 09029164164 is the published report line
forces.notes: NSCDC direct report line. 199 short code exists but may not connect reliably — use this 11-digit number instead.
